sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_logs (id UInt32, value Float64);
INSERT INTO test_logs (id, value) VALUES (1, exp(1));
UPDATE test_logs SET value = log(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, log(value) AS log_value FROM test_logs WHERE value > 0;
CREATE TABLE logged_results AS SELECT id, log(value) AS log_value FROM test_logs;
